_meta.resume_note: First-pass extraction is complete from Lemoore College's official 2025-2026 eLumen catalog. The cohort-specific Biology AS-T is modeled; the current marketing page's additional Biology AS is not present in the 2025-2026 program index and is retained only as a human-review discrepancy.

degrees.tmc_version_basis: The official 2025-2026 catalog requires calculus and a complete two-course physics sequence, matching the prior Biology TMC rather than Biology 2.0.
degrees.catalog_status_seen: Listed as a 60-unit A.S-T degree, effective Fall 2025, in Lemoore College's official 2025-2026 eLumen catalog; no inactive or teach-out language is displayed.

sources.locator: Biology (AST), Program Requirements and Recommended Sequence; effective Fall 2025

courses.title_seen: Electricity, Magnetism, Optics, and Modern Physics

major_groups.label_seen: Transferable elective units for total of 60 degree-applicable semester units

degrees.notes: The catalog narrative states that Cal-GETC requires 34 units and permits major/GE double counting. Its requirements summary displays 24 additional Cal-GETC units after 10 double-counted major units; 31 major + 24 additional GE + 5 electives = 60.

notes: Human-review discrepancy: Lemoore's current marketing page lists both Biology Associate of Science and Biology AS-T, but the authoritative 2025-2026 eLumen program index contains only Biology (AST), effective Fall 2025. The local Biology AS appears only in an older archive and is absent from the pinned 2025-2026 index, so it is not instantiated here. The eLumen public route serves an Angular shell directly, but its official published-content endpoint successfully returned the complete 2025-2026 requirements.
